layers.title: Route sampler design
layers.summary: The repo context is extended so future logging work routes to the new sampler design. The README now treats sampling as part of the logging module's responsibilities alongside trace, access, and lifecycle behavior.
layers.diff:
@@ -47,6 +47,7 @@
+| design unified class-based random log sampling | `modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md` | `src/datasystem/common/log/*`, `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/*`, `src/datasystem/common/metrics/hard_disk_exporter/*`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/*` |
@@ -46,7 +50,9 @@
-  - `AccessRecorder` records API/request performance and request/response metadata for client, access, and outbound-request style events.
+- `AccessRecorder` records API/request performance and request/response metadata for client, access, and outbound-request style events.
+- `LogSampler` provides unified random hash-threshold sampling across request/access/diagnostic dimensions, with per-request granularity and low-overhead hot-path decisions.
+- `AccessRecorder::Object`, `AccessRecorder::Stream`, and `AccessRecorder::RequestOut` are the recommended access-log facades.

layers.title: Replace register field
layers.summary: The worker/client protocol gains `LogSampleConfigPb` and carries it in register and heartbeat responses. In the actual diff, `RegisterClientRspPb` field 24 changes type in place from `int32 log_rate_limit` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config`, so old clients see a wire/schema incompatibility rather than a reserved-field migration.

layers.title: Swap embedded setters
layers.summary: The public embedded-worker configuration surface removes the integer rate-limit setter and adds three double-valued sampling-rate setters. The implementation validates finite values in `[0.0, 1.0]` and writes the new gflag names into `extraArgs`.

layers.title: Apply sampler config
layers.summary: Dynamic gflag update logic now validates sampler flags transactionally and commits them into the `LogSampler` snapshot. Register and heartbeat paths populate the new proto message, and clients apply it when present.

bcFindings.evidence: include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h removes `EmbeddedConfig &LogRateLimit(int limit);` and replaces it with RequestSampleRate/AccessSampleRate/DiagnosticSampleRate.
src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto changes field 24 from `int32 log_rate_limit` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config`.
src/datasystem/common/log/logging.cpp deletes the `DS_DEFINE_int32(log_rate_limit, ...)` flag and src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/flags.h removes `log_rate_limit` from the handled flag set.

cohorts.cohort: Sampler runtime and logging hot path

layers.title: Add sampler singleton
layers.summary: The new sampler stores immutable config snapshots behind atomics and precomputes ppm thresholds off the hot path. Runtime decisions use request trace state for request logs and per-event hashing for diagnostic/access sampling.

layers.title: Gate log construction
layers.summary: The macro precheck moves from `LogRateLimiter` to `LogSampler`, preserving fatal logs and adding a separate PLOG path. `LogMessageImpl` also gains a backstop for direct construction when the macro path did not already check sampling.

layers.title: Remove rate limiter
layers.summary: The old first-N `LogRateLimiter` target and source/header are deleted from CMake and Bazel dependencies. Trace and ZMQ metadata propagation now call `LogSampler` to create or apply request sampling state.
layers.diff:
@@ -8,21 +8,9 @@ ds_cc_library(
-)
-
-ds_cc_library(
-    name = "log_rate_limiter",
-    srcs = [
-        "log_rate_limiter.cpp",
-    ],
-    hdrs = [
-        "log_rate_limiter.h",
@@ -374,13 +374,24 @@ inline LogSampleState GetOrCreateLogSampleState()
-    bool admitted = false;
-    if (!LogRateLimiter::Instance().GetOrCreateRequestDecision(Trace::Instance().GetCachedHash(), admitted)) {
+    if (LogSampler::Instance().IsSamplerEnabledFast()) {
+        bool sampledIn = LogSampler::Instance().IsCurrentRequestSampledIn();

bcFindings.evidence: src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h and .cpp are deleted and build targets remove `log_rate_limiter`.
The deleted log_rate_limiter.h included public methods `SetRate`, `ShouldLog`, `GetOrCreateRequestDecision`, `IsEnabled`, and `Reset`; no compatibility wrapper remains.

layers.title: Introduce recorder facades
layers.summary: `AccessRecorder` no longer exposes direct `Record(...)` overloads; it becomes the core behind object, stream, and request-out facade builders. Each facade avoids filling request fields when sampling has already rejected the access record.

layers.title: Migrate client wrappers
layers.summary: C, C++, Java, Python binding, and client-side cache paths switch from eager `RequestParam` construction to fluent facade calls. This keeps the existing operations instrumented while deferring key summaries, sizes, and response fields until the recorder is sampled in.

layers.title: Migrate worker records
layers.summary: Worker object-cache, stream-cache, request manager, request table, and ETCD request-out instrumentation move to the same facades. The change preserves request-out as an unsampled category while allowing object and stream access logs to use sampler decisions.

bcFindings.symbol: datasystem::AccessRecorder::Record(StatusCode, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, const std::string&, uint64_t)
bcFindings.evidence: src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h deletes the public `Record` overloads and replaces usage with `AccessRecorder::Object/Stream/RequestOut` facades.

layers.title: Update config docs
layers.summary: User-facing documentation removes the old `log_rate_limit` and environment-variable guidance and documents the three sample-rate knobs. The dscli and logging guides explain worker authority, register/heartbeat propagation, and derived-rate behavior.
layers.diff:
@@ -38,7 +38,6 @@
-DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT
@@ -110,25 +110,57 @@
-大流量场景下，可通过 `log_rate_limit` 参数控制每秒采样请求数，避免高频请求日志产生过多磁盘 I/O。
+LogSampler 提供统一随机哈希阈值采样，替代旧的 `log_rate_limit` first-N 限速机制。
@@ -781,7 +781,14 @@
-| log_rate_limit | int | `0` | 每秒采样请求数上限（0表示不限速）。仅对带 traceId 的请求日志生效：被采样到的请求会完整打印链路日志，未采样请求的链路日志会被整体丢弃（包含 WARNING/ERROR/FATAL）。 |
+| request_sample_rate | double | `1.0` | 请求日志采样率，范围[0.0,1.0]。 |

layers.title: Update deployment knobs
layers.summary: Deployment JSON and Helm templates replace the single rate-limit value with request, access, and diagnostic sample rates. The worker daemonset now passes three environment-backed command-line arguments instead of `LOG_RATE_LIMIT`.

bcFindings.evidence: docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/client_env_guide.md removes `DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT`, and src/datasystem/common/log/logging.cpp removes the code that read `LOG_RATE_LIMIT_ENV`.
k8s/helm_chart/datasystem/values.yaml and templates remove `logRateLimit`/`LOG_RATE_LIMIT` in favor of three sample-rate values.

layers.title: Replace limiter tests
layers.summary: The old rate-limiter test target is removed and several focused sampler tests are added for core decisions, config parsing, access sampling, and integration. Existing logging and ZMQ metadata tests are migrated to `LogSampler` semantics.
layers.diff:

+ds_cc_test(

+    srcs = ["log_sampler_access_test.cpp"],
+)
@@ -24,13 +24,3 @@ ds_cc_test(
-    name = "log_rate_limiter_test",
-    srcs = ["log_rate_limiter_test.cpp"],

layers.title: Cover performance paths
layers.summary: The performance test is reworked from per-second limiter behavior to sampler overhead and payload-skipping behavior. The system test adds worker-to-client `LogSampleConfigPb` propagation coverage.
layers.diff:
@@ -0,0 +1,167 @@
+ * LS-013: Verify that the worker delivers LogSampleConfigPb to the client
@@ -1,222 +1,255 @@
-#include "datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h"
+// LogSampler performance coverage
@@ -77,7 +77,7 @@ class OCClientOneWorkerLogSizeTest
-        opts.workerGflagParams = "-shared_memory_size_mb=128 -v=2 -log_monitor=true -log_rate_limit=0";
+        opts.workerGflagParams = "-shared_memory_size_mb=128 -v=2 -log_monitor=true -request_sample_rate=1.0";

summary: This PR replaces first-N log rate limiting with a unified random LogSampler, propagates sampling config over worker/client protocol, lazily records sampled access logs, and updates deployment docs and tests.
